ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_month" TEXT /* Month when the order was placed */,
  "customer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer placing the order */,
  "uk_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UK region of the customer */,
  "cpa" REAL /* Cost per acquisition for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_uk_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("uk_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("uk_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "uk_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UK region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the UK region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region (e.g., UK) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region (e.g., NE for North East) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uk_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the customer belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("uk_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered in this item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "total_item_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the item including tax and discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "order_month" TEXT /* Month of the sales data */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the month */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed in the month */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for the sales data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the products sold */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders for the month */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of unique customers for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("uk_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_sales_order_month FOREIGN KEY ("order_month") REFERENCES orders ("order_month"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_sales_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES products ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which the feedback is given */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "is_recommended" TEXT /* Whether the customer would recommend the product (e.g., Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "cpa" REAL /* Cost per acquisition for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., age group, location) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used (e.g., email, social media, TV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product (when stock falls below this level, a reorder is triggered) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
